hooks.description: Inject deliver operating rules and available capabilities at session start

steps.message: Deliver plugin active. Use the deliver skill for issues that need a plan -> work -> review convergence loop. Read AGENTS.md for loop structure and rules.

hooks.description: Remind about change tracking after file modifications

steps.message: File modified. If executing in the deliver loop: track this change in the work report (files_changed or artifacts_changed). If deviating from the plan, document the deviation. Run project formatters/linters if configured.

Protected path detected. This file is guarded by deliver rules (lock files, secrets, generated files, vendored code). Modification requires explicit human approval plus structured protected_action_ack fields: path, action, reason, risk, approval_source.
